# Third-party spelling notices

## WeCantSpell.Hunspell 7.0.1

Weavie uses
[WeCantSpell.Hunspell commit ab5709d95b2d23541984d22baa0ab2d1e783582f](https://github.com/aarondandy/WeCantSpell.Hunspell/tree/ab5709d95b2d23541984d22baa0ab2d1e783582f)
as published in NuGet package version 7.0.1, without modification. The package carries the Hunspell
MPL 1.1/GPL 2.0/LGPL 2.1 notice; Weavie elects the MPL 1.1 option. The exact notice distributed with
the package is
[`WeCantSpell.Hunspell-LICENSE.txt`](WeCantSpell.Hunspell-LICENSE.txt).

## LibreOffice English dictionaries

The embedded `en_US`, `en_GB`, `en_CA`, and `en_AU` Hunspell assets are unmodified copies from
[LibreOffice dictionaries commit 208a9fd80b2a182fe20f224cd615119c6323ae2e](https://github.com/LibreOffice/dictionaries/tree/208a9fd80b2a182fe20f224cd615119c6323ae2e/en).
Their upstream English attribution and license notice is preserved verbatim in
[`LibreOffice-English-README.txt`](LibreOffice-English-README.txt).

## cspell-dicts software and language wordlists

The embedded software, TypeScript/JavaScript, C#, and Go vocabulary files are unmodified copies from
[Street Side Software cspell-dicts commit 83dbd80ba3b0e76b875534da7fa5f7d313ef5ea5](https://github.com/streetsidesoftware/cspell-dicts/tree/83dbd80ba3b0e76b875534da7fa5f7d313ef5ea5).
They are MIT-licensed; the complete upstream license is preserved in
[`cspell-dicts-LICENSE.txt`](cspell-dicts-LICENSE.txt).
